{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{$.Stored.title}} - {{"容器管理"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"容器管理"|$.T}}
  • {{$.Stored.title}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}

    {{`容器信息`|$.T}}

    {{$detail := $.Stored.detail}} {{if and $detail.SizeRw $detail.SizeRootFs }} {{end}} {{if $detail.Node}} {{end}} {{$.Fetch "docker/base/image/detail/config" $detail.Config}} {{$.Fetch "docker/base/image/detail/graph_driver" $detail.GraphDriver}}
    ID
    {{$detail.ID}}
    		 Created {{$detail.Created}}
    Path {{$detail.Path}} Args {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.Args}}{{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}}{{$vv}}{{end}}
    Name {{$detail.Name}} Image
    {{$detail.Image}}
    ResolvConfPath
    {{$detail.ResolvConfPath}}
    HostnamePath
    {{$detail.HostnamePath}}
    HostsPath
    {{$detail.HostsPath}}
    LogPath
    {{$detail.LogPath}}
    RestartCount {{$detail.RestartCount}} Driver {{$detail.Driver}}
    Platform {{$detail.Platform}} MountLabel {{$detail.MountLabel}}
    ProcessLabel {{$detail.ProcessLabel}} AppArmorProfile {{$detail.AppArmorProfile}}
    ExecIDs
    {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.ExecIDs}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}}
    SizeRw {{$detail.SizeRw}} SizeRootFs {{$detail.SizeRootFs}}
    Mounts
    ID {{$detail.Node.ID}} IP {{$detail.Node.IPAddress}}
    Addr {{$detail.Node.Addr}} Name {{$detail.Node.Name}}
    Cpus {{$detail.Node.Cpus}} Memory {{FormatBytes $detail.Node.Memory 2 true}}
    Labels
    {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.Node.Labels}} {{$kk}}: {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    HostConfig
    Binds {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.Binds}}{{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}}{{$vv}}{{end}}
    LogConfig {{if $detail.HostConfig.LogConfig.Config}}
    {{$detail.HostConfig.LogConfig.Type}}:
    {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.LogConfig.Config}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}} {{$kk}}: {{$vv}} {{end}}
    {{end}}
    PortBindings {{range $key,$hosts:=$detail.HostConfig.PortBindings}} {{$key}} {{range $kk,$vv:=$hosts}} {{if gt $kk 0}}   {{end}} {{$vv.HostIP}}:{{$vv.HostPort}} {{end}}
    {{end}}
    RestartPolicy {{$detail.HostConfig.RestartPolicy.Name}} MaximumRetryCount {{$detail.HostConfig.RestartPolicy.MaximumRetryCount}}
    AutoRemove {{$detail.HostConfig.AutoRemove}} NetworkMode {{$detail.HostConfig.NetworkMode}}
    VolumeDriver {{$detail.HostConfig.VolumeDriver}} VolumesFrom {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.VolumesFrom}}{{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}}{{$vv}}{{end}}
    CapAdd {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.CapAdd}} {{$vv}} {{end}} CapDrop {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.CapDrop}} {{$vv}} {{end}}
    CgroupnsMode {{$detail.HostConfig.CgroupnsMode}} Cgroup {{$detail.HostConfig.Cgroup}}
    GroupAdd {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.GroupAdd}} {{$vv}} {{end}} IpcMode {{$detail.HostConfig.IpcMode}}
    DNS {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.DNS}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		DNSOptions {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.DNSOptions}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    DNSSearch {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.DNSSearch}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		ExtraHosts {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.ExtraHosts}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    Links {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.Links}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}} {{$vv}} {{end}}     		OomScoreAdj {{$detail.HostConfig.OomScoreAdj}}
    PidMode {{$detail.HostConfig.PidMode}} Privileged {{$detail.HostConfig.Privileged}}
    PublishAllPorts {{$detail.HostConfig.PublishAllPorts}} ReadonlyRootfs {{$detail.HostConfig.ReadonlyRootfs}}
    SecurityOpt {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.SecurityOpt}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		Runtime {{$detail.HostConfig.Runtime}}
    StorageOpt {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.StorageOpt}} {{$kk}}={{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		Tmpfs {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.Tmpfs}} {{$kk}}={{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    UTSMode {{$detail.HostConfig.UTSMode}} UsernsMode {{$detail.HostConfig.UsernsMode}}
    ShmSize {{FormatBytes $detail.HostConfig.ShmSize 2 true}} Sysctls {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.Sysctls}} {{$kk}}={{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    ConsoleSize {{index $detail.HostConfig.ConsoleSize 0}} x {{index $detail.HostConfig.ConsoleSize 1}} Isolation {{$detail.HostConfig.Isolation}}
    MaskedPaths {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.MaskedPaths}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}     		ReadonlyPaths {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.HostConfig.ReadonlyPaths}} {{$vv}}
    {{end}}
    Resources 
    {{JSONEncode $detail.HostConfig.Resources `  `}}
    Mounts
    {{$.Fetch "docker/base/container/detail/mounts" $detail.Mounts}}
    Config
    GraphDriver
    NetworkSettings
    Bridge {{$detail.NetworkSettings.Bridge}} SandboxID
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.SandboxID}}
    HairpinMode {{$detail.NetworkSettings.HairpinMode}} SandboxKey
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.SandboxKey}}
    LinkLocalIPv6Address
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.LinkLocalIPv6Address}}/{{$detail.NetworkSettings.LinkLocalIPv6PrefixLen}}
    		 GlobalIPv6Address
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.GlobalIPv6Address}}/{{$detail.NetworkSettings.GlobalIPv6PrefixLen}}
    SecondaryIPAddresses
    {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.NetworkSettings.SecondaryIPAddresses}} {{$vv.Addr}}/{{$vv.PrefixLen}} {{end}}
    		SecondaryIPv6Addresses
    {{range $kk,$vv:=$detail.NetworkSettings.SecondaryIPv6Addresses}} {{$vv.Addr}}/{{$vv.PrefixLen}} {{end}}
    Ports {{range $key,$hosts:=$detail.NetworkSettings.Ports}} {{$key}} {{range $kk,$vv:=$hosts}} {{if gt $kk 0}}   {{end}} {{$vv.HostIP}}:{{$vv.HostPort}} {{end}}
    {{end}}
    EndpointID
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.EndpointID}}
    		 Gateway
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.Gateway}}
    GlobalIPv6Address
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.GlobalIPv6Address}}/{{$detail.NetworkSettings.GlobalIPv6PrefixLen}}
    		 IPAddress
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.IPAddress}}/{{$detail.NetworkSettings.IPPrefixLen}}
    IPv6Gateway
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.IPv6Gateway}}
    		 MacAddress
    {{$detail.NetworkSettings.MacAddress}}
    Networks 
    {{JSONEncode $detail.NetworkSettings.Networks `  `}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
